_publications._publicationTitle: Modulation of Ras signaling alters the toxicity of hydroquinone, a benzene metabolite and component of cigarette smoke.

_contextSnippet: We assayed CFU-GM colony growth at several HQ dosage levels for WT and Nf1−/− bone marrow cells... HQ caused a dose-dependent decrease in the proliferative ability of progenitor cells
details: Used for CFU-GM colony growth assays showing dose-dependent decrease in proliferative ability with hydroquinone treatment in both WT and Nf1−/− bone marrow cells
